description: Style NoteMake a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted  leatherette  handbag from hidekraft. With short handles and legs at the base, this bag makes for a fab combination of style and practicality.Product DetailsBlue handbag made of leatherette and has branding embossed on the frontHas two short handles to carry ease and style Has two main compartments with one compartment with a zippered pocket and other compartment with organizer sleevesMetal feet on baseMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 17 cmWidth: 30 cmDepth: 10 cm
